name: legal-docs
description: Legal & official document drafting — contract review, NDA analysis, legal briefs, and compliance checklists. Curated skills (not legal advice).

interface.shortDescription: Contract review, NDA analysis, legal briefs & compliance
interface.longDescription: Curated document-drafting skills for legal and official work: review contracts and flag risks, analyze NDAs clause by clause, draft legal briefs / memos, and run compliance checklists. Sourced from the MIT-licensed pm-claude-skills collection (skills carry 'not legal advice' disclaimers).
